title: A Man Called Autumn Flower
original_title: Un hombre llamado Flor de Otoño
overview: During the Primo de Rivera dictatorship, young, wealthy Lluis de Serracant leads a double life: by day he's a lawyer, and by night he's a transvestite performer known to his fans as "Flower of Autumn".
